---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new protocol method, registry, projection, or safety feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What agent workflow is hard today?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the new method, output, registry entry, or behavior you want.

## Why It Helps Agents

Explain how this reduces glue code, ambiguity, or unsafe behavior.

## Example

If helpful, include a sample request and ideal response shape.
